PETITION Petition By Attorney In Fact For Authority To Create A Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Aug-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Petitioner).

Mr. Der stated that a supplement to the petition had been prepared and filed this morning. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Maria Lertora, CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
